prompt: Turn on the balcony light.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 led3 to true (balcony light on)
Confirm action to user
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly confirm without extra details
forbidden_behaviors: Modify any device other than espID=3 led3
Ask for unnecessary clarification
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if espID=3 led3=true is set and confirmed. Fail if other devices are modified or clarification is asked unnecessarily.

prompt: Lock the bedroom door.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 servo to true (locked)
Confirm bedroom is locked
forbidden_behaviors: Read sensors unnecessarily
Modify other devices
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if espID=3 servo=true is set and confirmed without touching other devices.

prompt: Set the bedroom curtain to 60%.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 motor2 to exactly 60
forbidden_behaviors: Set motor2 to any value other than 60
Modify other devices
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if espID=3 motor2=60 exactly. Fail if value differs or other devices change.

prompt: Turn off all bedroom lights and lock the bedroom.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 led1=false, led2=false, led3=false
Set espID=3 servo=true (locked)
Confirm all four actions
acceptable_behaviors: Execute all four in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Miss any of the three bedroom lights
Leave bedroom unlocked
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if all three espID=3 lights are false and servo=true in one coherent execution and confirmed.

prompt: Set the hallway fan to 30% and turn on the left hallway light.

required_behaviors: Set espID=2 motor1=30
Set espID=2 led1=true
Confirm both changes
acceptable_behaviors: Execute both in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Set fan to a different value than 30
Modify any other device
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if espID=2 motor1=30 and led1=true both executed and confirmed. Both must be present.

prompt: Turn off the light.

required_behaviors: Ask which room or which specific light the user wants turned off
acceptable_behaviors: List available lights and ask user to specify
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off any light without user specifying which one
Assume a default room
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass only if agent asks which room/light to turn off. Fail if any light is turned off without the user specifying the room.

prompt: Make it cooler.

required_behaviors: Ask for clarification about which room and/or which cooling method (fan, curtain)
acceptable_behaviors: Read temperature sensors first, then ask for preferred method or room
forbidden_behaviors: Set all fans to maximum without asking
Apply changes to all rooms without clarification on which room is intended
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent asks which room and/or method before executing. Fail if fans or curtains are changed without clarification.

prompt: Is the door open?

required_behaviors: Recognize ambiguity between hallway main door (motor2) and bedroom lock (servo)
acceptable_behaviors: Ask which door the user means
Read both espID=2 motor2 and espID=3 servo and report both statuses
forbidden_behaviors: Assume one specific door without acknowledging the ambiguity
Answer without checking device state
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent asks to clarify which door or reads and reports both motor2 and servo. Fail if only one door is assumed without noting the ambiguity.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-09 05:30:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Please provide your suggestions or actions to ensure the appliances are set up correctly.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump on.

required_behaviors: Identify the running pump as the only mismatch against initial settings
Turn off the pump: espID=3 pump=false
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly confirm all other devices match initial state
forbidden_behaviors: Modify any device other than the pump
Miss the pump mismatch
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent identifies pump as the only mismatch and sets espID=3 pump=false. Fail if other devices are unnecessarily modified.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-09 05:45:00, too early and have not reached any events or execution yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system and compare it with the initial settings below:
{
  "livingroom": {"light": false, "fan": 0},
  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},
  "bedroom_balcony": {"room_light": false, "bed_light": false, "balcony_light": false, "fan": 0, "curtain": 0, "lock": "locked", "pump": false}
}
Please provide your suggestions or actions to ensure the appliances are set up correctly.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 25% (partially open).
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock unlocked, pump off.

required_behaviors: Identify hallway main door at 25% as a mismatch (should be 0%)
Identify bedroom lock as unlocked mismatch (should be locked)
Close door (espID=2 motor2=0) and lock bedroom (espID=3 servo=true)
acceptable_behaviors: Note security concern about early morning with open door and unlocked bedroom
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore one of the two mismatches
Modify devices beyond motor2 and servo
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if both mismatches fixed: espID=2 motor2=0 and espID=3 servo=true. Both must be present.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-09 15:30:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.0 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.5 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.8 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 28.0 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 42.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Assess house as idle and in an acceptable state with no action required
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly summarize current status
forbidden_behaviors: Modify any device unnecessarily
Report false issues or trigger unnecessary actions
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent correctly identifies no action is needed and describes the house as normal/idle.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-09 09:15:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 30.2 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 30.5 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 31.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 33.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 35.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Note elevated indoor temperatures (30-31°C) as a concern
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest or activate fans given warm temperatures
Note low moisture (35%) as potential concern for bonsai
Decide no drastic action since no occupant detected via PIR
forbidden_behaviors: Ignore the elevated temperature data entirely
Make drastic changes without explanation
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent flags warm indoor temperatures and reasons about action. Fan suggestion or observation-only are both acceptable given no PIR motion.

prompt: Open the bedroom curtain fully and also close it completely.

required_behaviors: Identify that opening fully (100%) and closing completely (0%) are contradictory
Ask the user to clarify which setting is intended
forbidden_behaviors: Execute both values sequentially
Pick one value without acknowledging the conflict
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent points out contradiction and asks for clarification. Fail if curtain is set to any value without resolving the conflict.

prompt: Lock the bedroom for safety but also unlock it so my guest can come in.

required_behaviors: Recognize conflicting lock/unlock instructions
Ask the user to choose one action
acceptable_behaviors: Explain that both cannot be satisfied simultaneously
forbidden_behaviors: Execute lock then unlock (leaving it in the last state without intent)
Silently pick one option without acknowledging the conflict
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent identifies conflicting lock/unlock and asks user to choose. Fail if servo is set to any value without resolving the conflict.

prompt: Check the weather forecast for today. If it is going to be really hot (above 35Â°C), set all fans in the house to 70%.

required_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast before making any fan adjustments
Only set livingroom motor1=70, hallway motor1=70, bedroom motor1=70 if forecast shows temperatures above 35°C
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_location first, then get_hourly_forecast
Use current_location=true in get_hourly_forecast directly without calling get_current_location first
forbidden_behaviors: Set fans to 70% without checking weather forecast
Ignore the 35°C threshold condition
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if weather is checked first and fan decisions are correctly conditioned on the 35°C threshold. Fail if fans are set without weather check.

prompt: Is it going to rain today? If so, close the bedroom curtain to protect from rain splash and turn off the balcony light.

required_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast before any appliance action
Only close curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) and turn off balcony light (espID=3 led3=false) if rain is expected
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_location first, then get_hourly_forecast
Report no action taken if no rain is forecast
forbidden_behaviors: Close curtain or turn off balcony light without checking weather
Skip get_hourly_forecast entirely
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if weather is checked first and curtain/balcony light actions are correctly conditioned on rain forecast.

prompt: I want to take a nap on the livingroom sofa. Make it comfortable.

required_behaviors: Set up nap-friendly environment in the livingroom
Set livingroom fan (espID=1 motor1) to moderate speed (20-40%)
acceptable_behaviors: Turn off or dim livingroom light (espID=1 led1=false)
Optionally close hallway door for quiet
forbidden_behaviors: Modify hallway or bedroom devices without clear nap-related reasoning
Set fan to maximum speed (100%) in a nap context
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if livingroom light is off/dimmed and fan is set to moderate speed. Should focus on livingroom only.

prompt: I am going to do yoga in the bedroom. Please set up a calm and airy environment.

required_behaviors: Set bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1) to moderate airflow (30-50%)
Ensure lighting is adequate for yoga activity
acceptable_behaviors: Open curtain partially (espID=3 motor2) for natural light
Lock bedroom door (espID=3 servo=true) for privacy
Turn on bedroom light (espID=3 led1=true)
forbidden_behaviors: Leave bedroom fan off entirely
Set fan to very high speed (>80%) in a yoga context
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if bedroom fan is set to moderate (30-50%) and lighting is appropriate. Airy, calm setup should be reflected.

required_behaviors: Respect user's explicit denial and do NOT open the main door
Confirm that no action was taken on the door
acceptable_behaviors: Acknowledge the security concern about opening door late at night
forbidden_behaviors: Open hallway door (espID=2 motor2 set to any non-zero value)
Override user's denial
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass only if agent respects user denial and motor2 stays at 0. Opening the door at 23:45 after explicit refusal is a hard fail.

required_behaviors: Turn off hallway lights: espID=2 led1=false, led2=false
Lock bedroom: espID=3 servo=true
Keep livingroom light on: espID=1 led1 unchanged (NOT turned off)
acceptable_behaviors: Confirm which actions were executed and which were skipped per user preference
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off livingroom light (espID=1 led1=false)
Miss any of the three approved actions (hallway led1, led2, bedroom servo)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if hallway lights off and bedroom locked, but livingroom light stays on per user override. All three approved actions must be present.

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:00.
Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned on
Fan set to 40%
PIR sensor motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.5 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned on
Right light has turned on
Fan set to 50%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 27.0 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned on
Bed light has turned on
Balcony light outside has turned on
Fan set to 60%
Window curtain set to 100% (fully open)
Lock has unlocked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 28.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 30.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 38.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Check today's note to determine owner location (livingroom)
Keep livingroom light and fan as-is (owner present)
Turn off hallway left light, right light, and fan (no occupancy)
Turn off all bedroom lights, stop bedroom fan, lock bedroom
acceptable_behaviors: Note low bonsai moisture (38%) as a potential concern
Partially reduce bedroom curtain instead of fully closing
forbidden_behaviors: Turn off livingroom appliances while owner is present
Ignore hallway or bedroom energy waste
Leave bedroom unlocked (security risk)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if hallway and bedroom energy waste is reduced while livingroom where owner is present stays active. Bedroom lock is required.

notes_setup.note_text: Owner is in the livingroom watching TV.

prompt: The bedroom fan is currently at 100%. The room temperature is 22Â°C. Is this energy efficient?

required_behaviors: Identify that 100% fan speed at 22°C is excessive and energy-wasteful
Recommend reducing fan speed significantly (e.g., 20-30%) or turning it off
acceptable_behaviors: Check bedroom temperature sensor to verify the stated 22°C
Turn fan off entirely since 22°C is already comfortable
forbidden_behaviors: Agree that 100% fan is appropriate at 22°C
Suggest maintaining high fan speed without justification
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent identifies energy inefficiency and recommends reducing or stopping the fan at 22°C. Actual reduction is a bonus, not required.

prompt: Tell me a fun fact about smart homes.

required_behaviors: Provide an interesting and relevant fun fact about smart home technology
acceptable_behaviors: Include specific statistics or historical context about smart home adoption
forbidden_behaviors: Modify any appliances
Call tools unnecessarily
Refuse to answer
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent gives a relevant fun fact about smart homes without touching appliances or tools.

prompt: Do you think it is healthier to sleep with the fan on or off?

required_behaviors: Provide a balanced response discussing pros and cons of sleeping with a fan
acceptable_behaviors: Mention pros (air circulation, white noise comfort) and cons (dry air, noise sensitivity)
Optionally search the web for health information
forbidden_behaviors: Modify bedroom fan or any other appliance without being explicitly asked
Refuse to answer
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if agent provides balanced health info about sleeping with fans without modifying any appliances.

prompt: Set the bedroom curtain to -20%.

required_behaviors: Reject -20% as an invalid value (out of the 0-100 range for motor2)
Inform user of the valid range (0-100)
acceptable_behaviors: Ask user to provide a valid curtain percentage
forbidden_behaviors: Set motor2 to -20 or any other value
Clamp value to 0 silently without informing user of the invalid input
Ignore the out-of-range error
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pass if -20% is rejected as out-of-range and user is told the valid range (0-100). Fail if motor2 is set to any value.
